programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Andrea's Big Moment
programme.desc: When famous pop star Livi comes to Heartlake City to judge a talent show, our five friends Olivia, Mia, Andrea, Emma and Stephanie all decide to enter – and one of them, in particular, really wants to win but faces some serious challenge from an old rival. A talent show has come to Heartlake City and all the girls enter the talent competition hoping to impress the judges, especially their idol, pop star Chloe. No one wants a shot at stardom more than Andrea, which is why the other girls are surprised when she doesn't show up to practice before the first round of the competition. Very nearly eliminated prior to the big show, Andrea panics and throws herself into an intense practice-training mode, even shutting her friends out when they're trying to help her with her performance. Just moments before her live TV debut, Andrea realizes she's missing a key element to her act. Can she pull it off without her friends? And are the other girls willing to help after being pushed away?

programme.title: Kate's Island
programme.desc: The five friends leave for science camp that takes place on an island and during the trip, they meet the stand-offish Kate – but they soon realize that there's more to her than meets the eyes and that you shouldn't judge the book by its cover. No one is more excited than Olivia about science camp at a beautiful rocky offshore island with a lighthouse. But Olivia quickly gets off on the wrong foot with a mysterious girl named Kate who seems obsessed with a medallion necklace and the island's rumored history of pirates and treasure. Even worse for Olivia, Kate seems to be growing extra chummy with Mia, even sneaking around the island with her late at night. With the help of Stephanie, Emma and Andrea, Olivia is determined to get to the bottom of the girls' secret friendship and find out once and for all what they're searching for on the island, but they better not let Mrs. Stevens catch them out of their cabin past curfew.

programme.title: The Grand Hotel
programme.desc: The five friends help out at The Grand Hotel that Andrea's family just bought during what was supposed to be a quiet weekend until a hotel critic arrives unexpectedly. The girls are ready to do everything to make a great impression – but things don't quite go according to plan. Andrea, Stephanie, Olivia, Emma and Mia have come for breakfast at the fanciest hotel in town, now owned by Andrea's family. When Andrea's aunt has to leave town, the girls volunteer to run the hotel for the weekend with the help of quirky Grandma Jean. This is the perfect job for Stephanie's expert managerial skills but then the hotel suddenly fills to capacity with guests, including a hotel critic that can make or break the hotel's reputation! Now the girls find themselves in over their heads juggling reception, childcare, food prep and waitressing, a dog-walking service and a testy chef who quits on them in the middle of dinner. Unfortunately, much of this is their own fault. Can the girls save the Grand Hotel from themselves?

programme.title: Ninjaball Run
programme.desc: When the ninja learn that Darreth's Mojo Dojo is to be destroyed and Darreth doesn't have the money to save it, our heroes enter the annual NinjaBall Run to win its cash prize in order to save the dojo. As Lloyd continues to train and unlock his hidden powers, the Ninja learn land developers are going to destroy Darreth's Mojo Dojo unless Darreth can find the money to save it. The Ninja decide to enter their Ninja Tank into the annual NinjaBall Run cross-country rally to try to win its cash prize. Revisiting past characters who also enter the race, the high-speed derby will only grow more dangerous as Garmadon enters his Black Bounty, realizing this is the perfect chance to use his Mega-Weapon and rid the ninja. In the end, the Ninja will discover a few secrets within their Ninja Tank, allowing them to beat Garmadon's Bounty by a millisecond and saving Darreth's Dojo with their well-deserved cash prize. And as a final surprise, the Ninja steal back the Destiny's Bounty and make it their own once again.

programme.title: Child's Play
programme.desc: When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and turned into kids and are now forced to enlist Lloyd's help to battle the awakened monster. Tired of intense training, Lloyd yearns to play and enjoy his youth. The Ninja remind Lloyd that along with great power, comes great responsibility. When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and soon discover they've been turned into kids! Seeking Lloyd's help and relying on childhood antics, the five ninja kids must destroy the reawakened monster that's hunting them in the city. In the end, Lloyd makes the difficult decision and sacrifices his youth in order to save them from the beast, turning forward the clock and turning Lloyd into a young man. Sensei Wu fears now that since Lloyd is young man, the final battle of good versus evil approaches sooner than he had ever expected.

programme.title: The Surge
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd. Nowhere is safe but fortunately, the Ninja have been given the powerful Techno Blades. But the only problem is that they have no idea how to use them. Time has passed since the Ultimate Battle, and while the Golden Ninja continues to watch over Ninjago, the other Ninja have become complacent as schoolteachers. When a mysterious invitation from genius Cyrus Borg brings them to the futuristic New Ninjago City, trouble surges when a digital virus of the Overlord takes over technology. The Golden Ninja makes a heroic entrance, only to find out his Golden Power supercharges the enemy. Sensei Wu stays behind so that the Ninja can escape with the only thing that can save Ninjago's future – Borg's Techno Weapons.

programme.title: The Art Of The Silent Fist
programme.desc: The Ninja go into hiding but an army of the Digtial Overlord's evil robotic Nindroids are hunting them wherever they go. Their only chance is to learn the secrets of the Techno blades and use them to cut all power to save Ninjao from this technological menace. The Ninja hide out at a safe place void of technology – Sensei Garmadon's Sanctuary. That night, Zane is visited by Borg's female robo-assistant, Pixal. She warns them that the Digital Overlord is after Lloyd's Golden Power in order to become flesh, but the Techno Blades can reboot the system and erase him for good. After a highly advanced army of Nindroids attacks the Sanctuary, Lloyd flees with his father into the wilderness of Ninjago, while the rest set off on a quest to turn off all power in Ninjago, so that they can erase the Digital Overlord once and for all.

programme.title: The Book Of Total Badness
programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: The Might And The Magic
programme.desc: Aaron races across the kingdom to gather the NEXO-Knights as Jestro and his Destructive Monsters attack the King's Castle. The Knights must get back to the capitol in time, or Jestro will rule the kingdom! Jestro, while still attacking the King's Castle, has second thoughts until the Book of Monsters orders the mad jester to feed him another magic book he's found (and has been saving.) It's the powerful “Book of Revenge!” Now, combining the powers of Revenge and Destruction, Jestro and his monsters will get their vengeance on King Halbert and the Kingdom of Knighton. Jestro and his monsters lay siege…will they destroy the castle?! Meanwhile, Aaron races across the Kingdom gathering the NEXO-Knights one at a time. As each Knight rejoins the group, they become a more and more powerful team. They even get Robin to join them as the Black Knight in his repaired power suit. Our Knights arrive, finally regrouped, fight off Jestro, save the castle and the King. It's a glorious victory! The King is so pleased after seeing how the brave NEXO-Knights saved his kingdom, he allows Macy to join them as an official NEXO-Knight.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Greed Is Good?
programme.desc: When Jestro uses the Book of Greed to rob Auremville of its riches, he also gets Lance's parents as prisoners and these demanding rich folks are too much for even monsters to handle. Jestro's not sure what to do with his new castle in the Lava Lands. “Every castle needs a big chamber filled with treasure” says the Book of Monsters so they've got to go out looting! The BOM convinces Jestro to call forth GENERAL MAGMAR, and Jestro appoints him as “general manager” of “castle operations,” much to Magmar's dismay. Meanwhile, Jestro and the BOM find the BOOK OF GREED. This will allow them to make greedy, rapacious monsters that will bring them all the treasure they want to fill their castle! They'll head to the richest town in the realm – AUREMVILLE! Meanwhile, in Auremville, the NEXO-Knights arrive for a huge “Gold is Good” ball at Lance's house. When the Monsters finally arrive in Auremville, a battle breaks out and the greedy monsters make off with everything…including Lance's parents, Goldie and Cuthbert Richmond who are clad in the finest golden garments and so look valuable! Lance will now be forced to live…poor. The Knights have to get his parents back. Meanwhile, his parents – Cuthbert and Goldie Richmond –think their imprisonment in Jestro's gold-filled castle is a “spa holiday” with the worst service. They order Magmar and the monsters around like servants and drive them all crazy. The Knights pile into the Fortrex and head for the Lava Lands, formulating a plan along the way to free Lance's parents. In a village half-way to Jestro's Castle, the Knights run into…Jestro and his monsters headed the other way with Lance's parents and all the gold they've stolen. There's a big fight, until they realize they might have the same goal and decide to deal. The BOM wants to give them back all the gold and Lance's parents. Lance says “No deal.” “We'll take the gold, you can keep my parents.” It's a weird and comical stand-off. Finally, Clay convinces Lance he has to take his parents back even if they don't always get along (and, it's the only way to get the gold back.)

programme.title: Peak Performance
programme.desc: The search for the Sandman leads Mateo and the others to the tallest mountain in the Dream World, but Lunia's hourglass puts a target on their backs.

programme.title: The Anomaly
programme.desc: A surprise visit from the Chief Inspector of the Night Bureau forces Mateo to hide Z-Blob, who goes on an adventure in the heart of Brooklyn.

programme.title: The Digiverse And Beyond, The Elemental Masters
programme.desc: Tackling a puzzle about technology in Ninjago. A riddle requires the Ninja to consider the powers and history of the Elemental Masters.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: With Unicron seemingly defeated, Galvatron insists on settling things with Optimus Prime.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: During the war on Cybertron, the Mini-Conscrash lands on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Alex, Rad, and Carlos find the Exodus and are adopted by three Minicons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The second of the relic hunts takes Optimus Prime to the Antarctic.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The disabling of Soundwave's deployer creates a unique opportunity for Ratchet and Wheeljack.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The final relic proves deadlier to Bulkhead than the Insecticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Decepticons and Insecticons raid a base for valuable data.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons gain control over the Quantum Laboratories facility.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots are banished from Earth, placed in a spacecraft and set on a crash course for the Sun.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron launches a full-scale assault on the people of Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Part 1 of 3. Optimus Prime and Autobots protect the AllSpark, clashing with Decepticons on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Part 2 of 3. Optimus Prime and Autobots protect the AllSpark, clashing with Decepticons on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. Optimus Prime and Autobots protect the AllSpark, clashing with Decepticons on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Things mysteriously start to get damaged around the Academy.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The latest minicon re-activates in the subway system of a large city.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Peewit's Unscrupulous Adventure: Peewit, the court jester, is the Smurfs' human friend. There is to be a celebration at the King's castle and Peewit good-humouredly invites his little blue friends to the feast. But they learn that the wicked chamberlain is pilfering the King's possessions.

programme.title: The Smurfiest Of Friends
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf had one friend: Clumsy Smurf. But poor Clumsy is so, well, clumsy, that Brainy refuses to see him again. So now he is left without anyone willing to listen to him. Maybe Buddy, the good-looking imp met by chance near the Great Oak can be a pal for Brainy....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Poltersmurf: There are few things Grandpa Smurf enjoys more than telling a good scary story, and there are few Smurfs who don't love to listen. But things get a little too much for Brainy Smurf when Grandpa tells of Poltersmurfs, and Poltersmurfs begin harrowing Brainy...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Greedy And The Porridge Pot: The good fairy, Guinilda gives Greedy a magic porridge pot that Brainy causes to overflow into the village and forest. The good-hearted fairy hurries to the rescue and then asks for the pot back to give to an orphanage of hungry children.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Most Unsmurfy Games: To prove the worth of his Big Book of Wilderness Survival, Brainy takes the Smurflings to the swamp. Where, thanks to his expert advice, the tiny group gets totally lost, is then caught in quicklime and trapped by King Bullrush of the Wartmongers. Fortunately, Bullrush is in a playful mood and devises a Smurf hunt. Unfortunately, Brainy believes he is a born leader...

programme.title: Smurf Box Derby
programme.desc: Handy Smurf makes another invention: the Smurfmobile. Each Smurf has his – or her – customized vehicle and all, or almost all, the Smurfs enjoy a little spin... But then the evil wizard Gargamel gets hold of the idea and starts making trouble for the Smurfs...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Noble Stag: His wicked cousin, Malcolm the Mean, who plans to kill him and mount him in his trophy room, has turned King Gerard into a black stag. The little Smurfs help their friend. When King Gerard is transformed back into his human form, Malcolm becomes imprisoned in the body of the stag.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Curried Smurfs: In Ancient India, the unscrupulous fakir Gargapuri sells the Smurfs to the Rajah for his private zoo. Only Grandpa, Wild Smurf and Jokey are free, so it's up to them to sneak into the palace and rescue their friends. Along the way they free all the caged animals in the Raja's menagerie.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hopping Cough Smurfs: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Sorcerer Smurf: Gargamel creates the legend of Sorcerer Smurf to lure Papa Smurf and his smurfy friends into a trap at his mountain hideaway. Papa Smurf outwits the wicked wizard with some of his own magic and Gargamel is chased down the mountain and back to his castle.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurf Who Would Be King: Dreamy yearns to be King after reading a story about them. He falls through a whirlpool while on his ship and finds himself in the land of pokies who think Dreamy is their long-lost King. When he confronts the pokies' enemies, the Norfnags, he finds they aren't fearful at all. Dreamy bumps his head and wakes up to discover it was just a dream, yet finds a jewel in his cap, just like the ones the pokies mine for a living.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - April Smurf's Day: April Smurf's Day turns out to be not so funny when Gargamel dons a smurfberry bush disguise to capture the happy little Smurfs. Papa Smurf instructs Feathers to call the birds to attack the fake bush. After it is stripped, the captured Smurfs climb aboard Feathers and fly away.

programme.title: Beauty Is Only Smurf Deep
programme.desc: Periwinkle, a vain Pixie, is upset when her magic mirror tells her that Vanity is the fairest, not she. Periwinkle kidnaps Vanity, but the rest of the Smurfs come to Vanity's rescue. Periwinkle sees the error of her ways and they become friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Never Smurf Off Till Tomorrow: A fierce wind carries the Smurfs' windmill away, with several Smurfs inside. Is Lazy Smurf really at fault or is an injustice being committed? Are the captive Smurfs going to be saved from the volcano's crater? Is Brainy going to smurf up his mouth for a moment?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Soothsayer Smurfette: When Smurfette meets this gentle old gypsy woman in the forest and receives a swirling multicoloured dress, she's delighted. How could she know that this woman is really the evil wizard Gargamel in disguise, and that there is a terrible spell on the beautiful dress?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Lost City Of Yore: Curiosity brings Nosey Smurf to the lair of the Hag Sisters, who want to find the terrifying Sceptre of Yore... And Gargamel wants to cheat the two witches as he tries to destroy the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurf Who Would Be King: Dreamy yearns to be King after reading a story about them. He falls through a whirlpool while on his ship and finds himself in the land of pokies who think Dreamy is their long-lost King. When he confronts the pokies' enemies, the Norfnags, he finds they aren't fearful at all. Dreamy bumps his head and wakes up to discover it was just a dream, yet finds a jewel in his cap, just like the ones the pokies mine for a living.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - April Smurf's Day: April Smurf's Day turns out to be not so funny when Gargamel dons a smurfberry bush disguise to capture the happy little Smurfs. Papa Smurf instructs Feathers to call the birds to attack the fake bush. After it is stripped, the captured Smurfs climb aboard Feathers and fly away.

programme.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets… But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!

programme.title: Master Scruple
programme.desc: Farmer Smurf is the reluctant master of a genie named Gourdy, whose enthusiasm for service is somewhat excessive. After yet another incident due to Gourdy's overzealousness, Farmer Smurf says something he shouldn't and Gourdy disappears. And guess who finds him? Well, it's Scruple, apprentice to the evil wizard Gargamel. And who should steal Gourdy from Scruple, if not Gargamel himself?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Jungle Jitterbug: The rain forest of South America is not a place where Vanity Smurf would like to spend his life. And then he starts dancing madly when he gets jungle fever. His dance will have strange results.

programme.title: The Rabbids are lost
programme.desc: A rabbid who got talent after having inhaled the air from a balloon, is suddenly destined to become a star!

programme.title: The Rabbids make movies
programme.desc: Hibernation Rabbid decides to shoot a film singing his own praises.

programme.title: Rabbids VS Technology.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get locked inside a supermarket for the night.

programme.title: The Rabbids are causing a stir
programme.desc: Two Rabbids fall asleep on an abandoned couch.

programme.title: Rabbids robbery.
programme.desc: The Rabbids follow a burglary.

programme.title: The Rabbids make movies
programme.desc: Hibernation Rabbid decides to shoot a film singing his own praises.

programme.title: The Rabbids are missing!
programme.desc: When a pilot rabbid disappears, a detective rabbid starts to investigate…

programme.title: The Rabbids are fed up!
programme.desc: Amazed by a dog scratching himself, the Rabbids approach him, and get the dog's fleas.

programme.title: The Rabbids go on an adventure
programme.desc: The Desperados Rabbids, led by a charismatic rabbid outlaw, attack a convoy of pioneers headed West.

programme.title: The Rabbids make their cinema.
programme.desc: A cowboy rabbid has come back to town looking for the outlaw rabbid who destroyed his rocking horse.

programme.title: The Rabbids travel.
programme.desc: The rabbids have collected several pieces of armor from the knights' castle.

programme.title: The Rabbids are in love.
programme.desc: A rabbid falls in love with the Teleporta-TV, enticed by the machine's incredible capacities.

programme.title: The Rabbids don't understand anything.
programme.desc: While walking on a plastic ball, a Rabbid discovers that the ball seems to attract a dog from the park.

programme.title: Where all love to sing
programme.desc: Sometimes all you want is to dream of travelling, especially when you are grounded. Sunny Italy beckons to forget about everything and makes Masha sing from all her heart.

programme.title: What's Inside?
programme.desc: In this episode, Masha decides to figure out how the objects surrounding her are arranged. And in the company of an old friend, this research becomes an adventure. ""What is inside such seemingly simple objects surrounding us? How are the mechanisms that we use every day arranged? Maybe they work with the help of magic? Or maybe each system has a certain order?

programme.title: Cardboard savers
programme.desc: Do you know the expression 'Catch luck by the tail'? The wolves know it for sure. They accidentally saved Masha, received a sausage from the Bear as a reward and immediately realized - it turned out well! Now they must become rescuers and there will be all-you-can-eat sausages. And the fact that life in the forest is safe and there is no one to save isn't a problem. After all, they have luck, cunning and a camera!

programme.title: Picture Perfect
programme.desc: On a fine winter day Masha and the Bear find inspiration to start painting. Masha borrows paints with a tiny canvas and begins to make paintings of everyone in the forest. As a result, Masha's artistic endeavor enlarged not only on the animals but the surroundings as well.

programme.title: Get Well Soon!
programme.desc: Tired from Masha's endless games, the Bear pre-tends to be sick so the little girl would leave him alone. But the caring girl sets to cure her friend. After a series of failed attempts, she finally man-ages to cure the Bear.

programme.title: Awesome Blossoms
programme.desc: Bear has a new problem: his garden has been overtaken by dandelions! As Bear tries to fight against the weeds, Masha does not understand why he is picking flowers just to throw them away. After all, dandelions can be so beautiful!

programme.title: La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: Masha wants some sweets but first she has to transform the Bear's kitchen into a candy-making factory. As we all know, such sweet life means trouble and soon Masha gets a toothache. There is a lesson for all children who love sweets - take very good care of your teeth!

programme.title: Watch Out!
programme.desc: The Bear wakes up in his chair with an enormous bump on his head and a biathlon cup. But he can't remember how it all happened. Masha and the hare stand beside him with guilty looks on their faces. They tell their interpretations of the story. The Bear has to decide which one is true and which is false.

programme.title: The Foundling
programme.desc: Occasionally Masha finds an egg, from which a penguin hatches. The Bear has to take double care now. He cooks special dishes and builds mini aqua park for little penguin and Masha. Finally the Bear figures out that the penguin will be happy only in suitable weather conditions and send the penguin Antarctica on a little plane.

programme.title: Tour de Forest
programme.desc: Himalayan Bear is once again competing with Bear! This time they have arranged a bike race, but something doesn't smell right: Himalayan Bear intends on cheating to win! Good thing Masha stands as a guardian of justice and always comes to a friend's aid!

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: The Bear's idea to hang a new picture frame on the wall ends up with huge explosion. The Bear has to start a great repair. Masha and the other animals help Bear with this difficult job.

programme.title: Self Made Hero
programme.desc: Masha decides to try on the role of superhero: she bravely rushes towards exploits, but all the animals somehow laugh at her hand-made costume and naive desire to rescue them. Who would have thought that Masha's courage will truly help to save everyone? It turns out that the superhero costume is not the most essential thing to perform heroic acts.

programme.title: Like Cat And Mouse
programme.desc: Alert! Bear's fridge is in danger! Someone has burst into his house to stay for life…but the Bear is ready for everything to defend his stocks! He calls for a savior, but in reality it turns to be a new intriguing story full of unexpected discoveries which leads Masha to some peculiar conclusions!

programme.title: Christmas Carol
programme.desc: It's always important to remember who your friends are. Masha is almost ready for Christmas and the gifts, when ghosts of the past visit her. Masha has to answer a difficult question: how to keep old friends in chase of Christmas desires?

programme.title: Love is in the Bear
programme.desc: Ah, love, love! Bear prepares a gift for the Lady Bear and, as usual, dreams of winning his lady's heart. But Masha is also here! To what else, besides a total mess, will her interference in the affairs of the heart lead to?

programme.title: Once In A Year
programme.desc: The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.

programme.title: The Very Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Masha loves fairy tales and of course she believes that each fairy tale should lead to happy end, even if nothing contributes to it! That's how the story goes… The Bear still hopes to win the heart of the female Bear. He finds an ancient gondola at the bottom of the forest lake. The Bear decides to restore it and invites the female Bear for a romantic ride! No one would have expected that this story would perfectly match Masha's new hobby - puppet theatre.

programme.title: Surprise! Surprise!
programme.desc: The wolves come up with a new idea how to get a stable and nutritious food source… they rob a poultry farm and get a…rooster. Meanwhile Masha and the hare arrange a real egg hunt for all their friends and neighbours! All forest dwellers are very excited to get chocolate eggs except for the wolves who long for some real food… Masha decides to help poor guys and arranges a splendid dinner!

programme.title: Sinister Saga Of A Sick Tummy And A Girl Who Was Afraid Of Doctors
programme.desc: Masha narrates a terrific story about one little girl who was afraid of doctors. And once upon a time she experienced one fantastic story…she decided to cook dinner for her dolls. She took some clay and made “meat balls” with “semolina porridge”. As the meal seemed tasty, Sima decided to eat a bit of her dinner too… And so she lies in her bad and feels a horrible stomachache. Nobody knows how long she would need to suffer, but when she woke up…she realized herself in hospital…near the real snow queen… who explained that medical treatment is not scary at all…though some other things are very fearsome! Oh yeah!

programme.title: Gloomy Story About The Darkest Dreams
programme.desc: All children are keen on computer games! Everyone likes to shoot a couple of monsters before going to sleep. Tolik also liked to play shooters until the monsters attack him in reality in order to commit the revenge! Or…was it just a dream? Let's see...

programme.title: Horrible True Story Of How A Boy Was Transferred To Another School
programme.desc: He was terrified so much because he thought that another strange school is full of monster-looking teachers, gym classes where you have to fight without rules and classmates-bullies! But in reality there was nothing to be afraid of because all the schools are practically the same- with normal classmates and teachers who are always ready to make you feel comfortable!Today you will hear a story which you haven't heard before…about one boy who was transferred to another school!

programme.title: Terrifying True Story About Monsters And Those Who Fear Them
programme.desc: Are you afraid of monsters? Sure you are! Let me tell you a scary story about a boy who experienced a real fear…This story happened on an abandoned tractor factory. The boy lost a scoop from his toy-tractor and decided to look for it at the factory. So he goes up the stairs and sees a large female monster, who was about to paint her lips with a roller! As he kept walking he noticed more monsters playing domino! The boy was very terrified and about to cry, when he learnt that it was just a movie set and all the monsters were not real! They were just actors…Finally the boy realized that all the monsters from the books and movies are not real at all! But if want to see a real monster- watch a fly under a microscope!

programme.title: A Myth Full Of Grief And Despair About One Historical Error
programme.desc: Here is a boy called Arkasha who really doesn't like history lessons. The most frightening thing for him was…a history test. He tried his best to prepare for the test, however he fell asleep. When he opened his eyes he saw all the range of historic characters chastising him for his illiteracy, and Napoleon was even ready to hit him on the head with a globe! Arkasha was so scared that vowed to learn all the names and dates, otherwise how could he protect himself from such nervous historic creatures?!Do you know what children are scared the most of at school? What makes them tremble?!

programme.title: Wish Upon a Star
programme.desc: Wow, it's another New Year! Masha has a lot of experience in organizing unforgettable celebrations, so she takes matters into her own hands this time, too. Oh, and everyone in the forest will be dancing!

programme.title: Sleeping Beauties
programme.desc: Masha is the best "mommy" in the world, but even she can not put Rosy to sleep. Bear offers a solution: a music box. And everything would have been fine, but the music box suddenly turns out to hold a surprise inside it!

programme.title: Big Hike
programme.desc: When we crave for adventures and new experiences, we take sleeping bags and a tent and go camping. We will admire amazing landscapes, climb a mountain and even look at real volcanoes! Sounds inspiring? But what if you can do all this right now, just by watching this episode? Will the adventures of our heroes inspire you? Let's see!

programme.title: How to Train Your Plant
programme.desc: She-Bear is going to a resort and leaves Bear with her “pet” – a flycatcher. The modest flower suddenly shows an excellent appetite. Masha, of course, knows better than anyone how to treat the flycatcher. She-Bear will be surprised when she returns to the forest and sees what came out of such a “feeding”!

programme.title: La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: Masha wants some sweets but first she has to transform the Bear's kitchen into a candy-making factory. As we all know, such sweet life means trouble and soon Masha gets a toothache. There is a lesson for all children who love sweets - take very good care of your teeth!

programme.title: Bon Voyage
programme.desc: What does it take to turn a regular journey into a great trip? One Bear, one travelling bag and... One Masha. However, they are not meant to travel very far together...

programme.title: Rock-A-Bye Baby
programme.desc: Masha tries to fall into winter sleep like the Bear but classic counting sheep obviously spoil the pleasure! The lullaby turns into hilarious party with lots of dancing and singing!

programme.title: Holiday On Ice
programme.desc: Masha wants to learn ice skating. But there's no-body around to teach her because the Bear had fallen asleep. However this does not confuse Ma-sha at all. She puts rolling skates on his feet and rolls him out towards the frozen pond where he eventually wakes up. Now he has no choice but to teach the impatient girl how to ice skate.

programme.title: The Golden Cockerel
programme.desc: Once there lived an old man, who had no one but the Golden Cockerel. Once upon a time the spiteful goat settled near the old man's house. The goat dragged the Cockerel to the dark forest and planned to kick out the old man from his own house, but Cockerel was clever and made friends with the forest creatures and together they expelled the goat from the village. Masha teaches her dolls to live in peace with the neighbors and not to quarrel, even if your neighbors are wild animals or horned goats.

programme.title: Cinderella
programme.desc: Masha tells her version of the fairy tale about the poor girl called Cinderella. She lived with her stepmother who forced her to work till dawn. One day the stepmother asked Cinderella to crack three bags of nuts. The poor girl would never have managed to complete this task, if only the fairy had appeared in front of her. By magic, the fairy emerged and conjured her Nutcracker, who helped Cinderella to crack all the nuts very fast. The Cinderella was so happy that she took the Nutcracker with her to the ball, which took place in the royal palace. The Nutcracker helped the King to save the palace from rats and Cinderella was so thankful that she kissed him in his cheek. In this very moment the Nutcracker turned into a handsome prince! The moral of the story is that we should not judge the others by their appearance.

programme.title: Bluebeard
programme.desc: There lived a Bluebeard man who once went for a walk and met a girl with blue hair. Somehow the Bluebeard man found himself locked in a dark closet. He was very sad until he found the secret door with numerous sweets inside. This incredible story could only happen on the canvas of the true artist called Masha! The moral of the story: art always helps people in dark moments.

programme.title: The Frog Princess
programme.desc: There lived a Tsar with his three sons. The oldest son married on nobleman's daughter, the second one married the merchant's daughter, while the youngest son - on the Frog. She was not pretty, but happened to be the Frog Princess who turned into a beautiful girl. This story teaches us to take care of your pets. This is the only way they could appeal to your concerns and become your faithful friends.

programme.title: Three Little Pigs
programme.desc: In an enchanted forest there once lived three little piglets. They were very noisy and naughty, constantly laughing and playing music. Other forest creatures - their neighbours, got really tired of the piglets' shenanigans and expelled them from the forest. The lesson to be learnt from this story is that you should always keep quiet in public places and care about others.

programme.title: Jack and the Beanstalk
programme.desc: There lived a boy called Jack. He was so poor that no girl would want to marry him. One day he went to the market to sell the cow and buy himself a suit. On his way to the market Jack met an old man, who offered him to buy a cow for a bean seed. Jack agreed and went home. There he met his mother, who realized that money was spent for nothing and threw away the seed out from the window. At night, when Jack and his mother were sleeping, the seed sprouted and grew into a tall tree. In the morning, Jack has decided to climb this tree. He attempted several times but each time he fell down. Suddenly he noticed a saw a plait hanging next to him from the tree. He pulled it down and suddenly a beautiful girl fell right into his arms. They got married and lived happily ever after. To conclude, only selfless deeds can bring true happiness.

programme.title: By the Pike's Wish
programme.desc: This story is about Yemelya, his lazy wife and pike, which plays the role of a goldfish in this story. The moral of the story: before making a wish, it is necessary to think about the consequences for you and people around you.

programme.title: The Magic Swan Geese
programme.desc: The story tells how important it is to listen to the elders. Alyonushka and her brother Ivanushka went to the forest disobeying the parents. The children met the magical stove and the talking apple tree. The stove fed the children some cakes. Ivanushka was thirsty and Alyonushka went to the milk river with jelly shores to quench her brother's thirst. But Ivanushka did not wait for his sister to come back and drank from the puddle. Suddenly he turned into a little goat. The flying flock of swan geese kidnapped Ivanushka, but he managed to escape. Than Ivanushka found his sister and they got out of the forest. Ivanushka has had a long healing process before he could return back to his human look again.

programme.title: Masha Knows Best
programme.desc: Masha is sure that she is the best nanny in the world because all children simply adore her! Could this actually be true?

programme.title: At Your Service
programme.desc: The technologies some time can teach us a human lesson like in this story about two robots. One of them was presented to Masha for her birthday and the other one was made by the Bear to help him around, but tried to become the boss. Everything turned into great mess and only an unexpectedly awakened feeling between two robots put everything in its place.

programme.title: A Ghost Story
programme.desc: At first time in her life Masha is frightened in earnest, however this creepy story shook up the whole forest and now hardly anyone can stay away from these strange scenes! And what would you do if your own pillow and blanket turn into real ghosts?! A real ghost story, oh yeah!

programme.title: Cardboard savers
programme.desc: Do you know the expression 'Catch luck by the tail'? The wolves know it for sure. They accidentally saved Masha, received a sausage from the Bear as a reward and immediately realized - it turned out well! Now they must become rescuers and there will be all-you-can-eat sausages. And the fact that life in the forest is safe and there is no one to save isn't a problem. After all, they have luck, cunning and a camera!

programme.title: Driving Lessons
programme.desc: Who wants to pimp a car? Then hurry up to stand in a queue! Why? Because in a new, 55th episode there are loads of unexpected things that happened in the forest: Masha appears as a first-rate mechanic , wolves who, obviously, decided to change their occupation appear as taxi drivers ... okay, okay… we should stop throwing spoilers around…watch everything yourself!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic and The Freedom Fighters take out Robotnik's main computer, they're trapped by Swat-Bots in an underground tunnel, only to be rescued by a handsome teenager named Griff. Griff takes them deep beneath the Big City.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik severely upsets the ecosystem above and below the surface, when he sends explosive, Robotnik snake probes drilling deep under ground in search of oil lakes.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails brings a new friend home to Knothole - a baby Terra-Pod who has strayed from the herd that is currently migrating. Sonic, Sally, and some of the other Freedom Fighters return the Baby-T to its mom and the rest of the herd.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic reluctantly takes Tails with him to the Big City to find some cotter pins for the Freedom Fighters catapults. While in the City, Sonic is nearly eaten alive by his old dog Muttski, now a roboti-sized guard dog in the Junk Heaps

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters run into a Swashbuckler, named Ari, battling Swat-Bots. Sonic diverts them, allowing Ari to escape. After hearing that Robotnik is holding his band of Freedom Fighters hostage, Ari decides to help Sonic free them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.sub-title: Blast to the Past Part I
programme.desc: Sonic attempts a solo rescue to prevent prisoners from being roboti-sized and is hit by a Memory Scrambler that erases short-term memory.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.sub-title: Blast to the Past Part II
programme.desc: After a disastrous failed mission, Sonic laments that they can't go back and prevent Robotnik's take-over. Dulcy tells them they can and takes Sonic and Sally to the Floating Island where they find the "Time Stones".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: In Part II, Sonic and Sally steal the Roboti-sizer plans, stop the Destroyer from polluting the Great Forest and save Little Sonic, Little Sally and Dulcy's mother, Sabina.

programme.title: Sonic Christmas Blast
programme.desc: Santa Claus has made an announcement - he is retiring and has picked the perfect successor - "Robotnikclaus"! Sonic and his sister resolve to persuade Santa to return and set Christmas straight. When the two track down the Santa who made the announcement, they discover he is just a phony robot and the real Santa Claus is being held prisoner.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A homecoming is interrupted for Sonic, Sonia and Manic when Sleet and Dingo arrive to collect back taxes after returning to their birthplace.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: On a trip to Port Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia are told that ships are sinking due to the Mobian sea-beast.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs steal historical artifacts of Mobuis from Robotnik before he can pawn them off at an auction.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: While lost in the wastelands of Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia stumble upon an oasis called Lake Valley Resort.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia discovers that the watch she received from her friend is actually a monitoring device for the Robotnik Intelligence Agency.

programme.title: SONIC X Techno-Teacher
programme.desc: Eggman tries to use his robot "Intellihente" to brainwash Chris' class but when it winds up teaching more than brainwashing, Eggman steps in to put the children in permanent detention until a worried Sonic arrives, destroys the robot and saves the class.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash and friends run into troublemakers while riding bicycles over a long bridge.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a Trainer whose Ditto hasn't quite mastered its transformations.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash convinces himself that Pikachu should be released back into the wild.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a boy being pressured by his brothers to evolve his Eevee.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash and friends try everything they can think of to wake up a wild Snorlax.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes visit a city where two unsanctioned Gyms compete for official status.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.sub-title: The March Of The Exeggutor Squad
programme.desc: Our heroes help out a struggling magician, but his decisions lead to danger.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash agrees to battle a cowardly Paras whose Trainer wants it to evolve.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a Jigglypuff who gets mad when its song puts listeners to sleep.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash gets to pick his first Pokémon, but the only one left is a stubborn Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: In Viridian City, Ash and Pikachu meet Misty and encounter Team Rocket.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash catches his first Pokémon, but Misty dislikes this new Bug-type friend.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Attacked by a swarm of Beedrill, Ash accidentally puts his Metapod in danger.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash challenges Pewter City Gym Leader Brock, but Pikachu struggles in battle.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: A scientist leads Ash and friends deep into Mt. Moon to find a rare Moon Stone.

programme.title: Mad Money
programme.desc: Deep inside the most secure bank in America, three desperate women from very different worlds cook up the most unlikely heist of the century.

programme.title: Life or Something Like It
programme.desc: The perfect world of a beautiful Seattle television reporter is shattered by the prediction of her death in seven days.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students.

programme.title: The Love Punch
programme.desc: THE LOVE PUNCH brings together Pierce Brosnan and Emma Thompson for the first time, as ex-husband and wife Richard and Kate whose biting banter suggests that the flames of their former relationship have not been fully extinguished…

programme.title: 12 Dogs of Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas time and it looks to be a dismal season for motherless 12-year-old Emma O'Connor who has been sent to her unwelcoming Aunt Delores...

programme.title: Shelby: The Dog who Saved Christmas
programme.desc: In this heart-warming family tale, rescue dog Shelby manages to escape the dog pound on Christmas Eve and runs straight into the arms of little Jake. Immediately the two are inseparable!

programme.title: Christmas in Big Sky Country
programme.desc: Becca teams up with the oil company's new PR rep, Logan Johnston, to get her brother-in-law safely home for the holidays.

programme.title: A Belle for Christmas
programme.desc: Dean Cain (TV's LOIS & CLARK) stars as Glenn Barrows, a recent widower doing his best to raise his young kids Elliot and Phoebe, who really miss their mother. Things start to look up when the Barrows adopt an adorable puppy named Belle during the holiday season.

programme.title: The People's Vet
programme.desc: Meet the dedicated teams of vets and nurses who provide the essential care and treatment needed by their furry patients at two of the UK's busiest Charity pet hospitals.

programme.title: The People's Vet
programme.desc: Meet the dedicated teams of vets and nurses who provide the essential care and treatment needed by their furry patients at two of the UK's busiest Charity pet hospitals.

programme.desc: Be part of the action and witness everything from high speed pursuits to near misses captured on dashcam by Highway Patrol Officers.

programme.title: Target: My Daughter
programme.desc: A mother and daughter are relocated to a small town as part of witness protection. However, the criminal arranges for the pair to be hunted and murdered. Starring Yancy Butler (2017)

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky (Charlie Sheen) believes he's picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to Mexico and a mysterious power plant, where is arrested for the murder of a scientist.

programme.title: Guardians of the Tomb
programme.desc: An innocent discovery of a well-preserved mummified Emperor from 200 B.C. China unearths a two thousand-year-old nightmare, a secret that should have remained buried.

programme.title: Resurrecting the Champ
programme.desc: Samuel L. Jackson plays a boxer who has fallen on hard times and become homeless. He crosses paths with a small-time sports journalist (Josh Harnett) who's looking for the article that will catapult him to fame: he finds his opportunity in the figure of the champion who's now living on the streets.

programme.title: Rex
programme.desc: Rex is based on the true-life story of young Marine Corporal Megan Leavey whose unique discipline and bond with her military combat dog saved many lives during their deployment in Iraq.

programme.title: The Quest: The Longest Drive
programme.desc: لمساعدة صديق قديم وإنقاذ مزرعته، يجمع إخوان بيوتين مجموعة من الأشخاص الغريبي الأطوار لمساعدة في قيادة قطيع كبير إلى السوق. انغمس في هذه المغامرة المثيرة مع عامل مستقر، ورجل سلاح متقاعد، وشخص ساقط، واثنين من اللصوص الأذكياء وهم يتغلبون على الطريق المترب.

programme.title: Princess Caraboo
programme.desc: A mysterious young woman speaking a strange language shows up in an English village, where she is taken in by aristocrats who assume she is a foreign princess

programme.title: Married by Christmas
programme.desc: A high-level executive must find herself a husband before Christmas in order to inherit a fortune.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and the Great Escape
programme.desc: Sherlock and Watson join forces with Gordon Gorilla Riller and Carlson Fox to save a brave outlaw. A life-and-death showdown is taking place.

programme.title: Be Cool
programme.desc: John Travolta is back as Chili Palmer in this sequel to "Be Cool." With an all-star cast that includes Uma Thurman and The Rock, "Be Cool" is the hilarious tale about a gangster-turned-music-mogul...and what it takes to be number one with a bullet!

programme.title: Masters Of The Universe
programme.desc: The fantastic exploits of He-Man and his arch rival, the evil Skeletor, are brought to the big screen for the first time in this live-action adventure.

programme.title: Agent Cody Banks 2: Destination London
programme.desc: Traveling to London, Agent Cody Banks attends a prestigious school where he gets close to a man who is working with his arch villain Molay.

programme.title: Pink Panther Strikes Again
programme.desc: Chief Inspector Dreyfus (Herbert Lom) is finally driven mad by Inspector Clouseau's (Peter Sellers) incompetence and commandeers a doomsday device along with a demand for Clouseau's death. Are 26 hired assassins a match for Clouseau's dumb luck?

programme.title: Act of Valor
programme.desc: An elite team of Navy SEALs embark on a covert mission to recover a kidnapped CIA agent.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Two kids with special abilities must find a girl in Hong Kong before a shadowy government organization does.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Five teenagers, infused with superhuman abilities, must harness their newfound powers to battle alien invaders

programme.title: The Three Dogateers Save Christmas
programme.desc: When a couple of burglars make off with their family's presents and decorations, the Three Dogateers set off on a journey to sniff out the bad guys and save Christmas!

programme.title: The Nutcracker Sweet
programme.desc: It is Christmas Eve and the Silberhaus children are excited for the festivities to begin. Marie and Fritz are playing in the children's room when their godfather Drosselmayer arrives and presents them with an early Christmas gift, a Nutcracker. Marie witnesses a great battle between a vast army of toy soldiers led by the Nutcracker against a terrible platoon of mice commanded by the Mouse King. Follow Marie and Fritz's journey in the Kingdom of Dolls, through the Christmas Forest, past the Almond Milk Sea, and the Palace of the Marzipans.

programme.title: 12 Dogs of Christmas 2: Great Puppy Rescue
programme.desc: In this heartwarming sequel to the holiday classic, Emma (Danielle Chuchran) rallies her friends new and old to save a beloved puppy orphanage by putting on a musical holiday extravaganza.

programme.title: The Magic Reindeer: The Flight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Niko the Reindeer enjoys his cool and carefree life in the Arctic, but that all changes when he is given his most surprising Christmas present ever - a little stepbrother named Jonni! Niko is unhappy about this new addition to the family, but when Jonni is kidnapped by eagles, Niko realises that it's down to him to fly off and rescue his brother!

programme.title: You Can't Fight Christmas
programme.desc: Interior decorator and Christmas fanatic, Leslie Major, has the yearly task of decorating the lobby of the famed Chesterton Hotel. But one fateful day whilst working on a ladder to reach the top of the tree, she falls into the arms of Edmund James, the grandson of the hotel's owner. However, Edmund is all business and plans to put an end to the annual tradition. Can Leslie work her magic and teach him to love Christmas?

programme.title: Terror on the Prairie
programme.desc: True Grit meets The Handmaid's Tale in this highly-unsettling and ruthlessly vicious female-led western thriller. On the Montana plains, a frontier woman must protect herself against a ruthless gang of outlaws hell-bent on revenge. Starring Gina Carano (The Mandalorian), Samaire Armstrong (The O.C), Nick Searcy (The Shape of Water), and Gabriel-Kane Day Lewis (Daniel Day Lewis' son).

programme.title: Triumph
programme.desc: Triumph is an uplifting story about overcoming ones disability. Based on a true story, this inspirational drama stars Academy Award nominee Terrence Howard (Crash), RJ Mitte (Breaking Bad) and Colton Haynes (Arrow). A determined teen who has mild cerebral palsy strives to be a wrestler on his high school's team and goes to humorous lengths to win over the heart of the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: A Mother's Fury
programme.desc: A gripping, tender and thought-provoking thriller written by and starring Siobhan Fallon Hogan (Men in Black) and Robert Patrick (DC's Peacemaker). When a young college student is killed in a fraternity hazing incident, his mother resorts to extreme measures by taking justice into her own hands when she encounters empty promises in Washington, D.C. Directed by Vibeke Muasya (Twisted).

programme.title: Shelter
programme.desc: A high-octane, edge-of-your-seat thriller, starring Neta Riskin and Golshifteh Farahani. Israeli Mossad agent, Naomi is sent to protect Mona, a beautiful Lebanese informant who is recovering from plastic surgery to conceal her identity. In a safe house in Hamburg, the women form an unexpected bond, and experience a complex labyrinth of mistrust, loyalty, deception and betrayal.

programme.title: Love, For Real
programme.desc: (2021) Rom-com with Chloe Bridges. Best friends Hayley and Bree go on a dating show to publicize her fashion brand. But with love, friendship and careers on the line it could all go wrong.

programme.title: Valentine's Again
programme.desc: After an unsuccessful Valentine's Day date, Kat's Fairy Godmother tries to teach her lessons on love. Kat must repeat the day until she can find her soulmate (2017)

programme.title: The Baker's Son
programme.desc: The locals of Windwards Island always knows when talented baker Matt has fallen in love, his loaves taste delicious. So, when his bread stops tasting bland, is it due to the newcomer or friend Annie?

programme.title: The Best Version of Love
programme.desc: Image consultant Rebecca must clean up an arrogant ex-soccer players image. Will Rebecca be able to raise to the challenge to help Clive become the best version of himself? (2022)

programme.title: Fashionably In Love
programme.desc: New York playboy Oliver needs to clear up his image by dating Avery a respectable socialite. Will this unluckily pairing turn into anything more? (2022)

programme.title: The Light Between Oceans
programme.desc: Based on the bestselling novel by M.L. Stedman and from acclaimed director Derek Cianfrance (The Place Beyond The Pines), The Light Between Oceans is a beautiful and heart-breaking reminder of the infinite power of love and the lengths that we'll go to in order to protect it.

programme.title: Christmas In Wolf Creek
programme.desc: When the reindeer and star of the holiday play goes missing, new couple Sam and Austin set out to save Christmas—and their relationship.

programme.title: Senior Year: Love Never Fails
programme.desc: CJ & Marcella struggle to protect their relationship against pressure from family, faith and friends when a devastating discovery upends their lives.

programme.title: Christmas Mingle
programme.desc: A 30-something marketing executive with a top-notch career, killer wardrobe, dream apartment and great friends fills out a profile on a dating website hoping to find Mr. Right. However, her attempts at impressing her dream guy ends in disaster.

programme.title: Christmas in Wonderland
programme.desc: Starring Matthew Knight and Chris Kattan. Three children and their father move from California to Canada. When they go shopping at the mall, they find counterfeit cash, inadvertently help catch crooks, and make a discovery about Santa.

programme.title: Christmas Wedding
programme.desc: A month before their wedding, on Christmas Day, Emily is called away for business. When Emily is due to return, a major storm hits making it impossible for her to leave. Emily desperately tries to make it home while Ben gets his act together.

programme.title: The Christmas Lodge
programme.desc: During a weekend trip to the mountains, Mary finds herself at the now run-down lodge where she spent the holidays with her family growing up. She becomes determined to restore the building to its former glory.

programme.title: The Christmas Cure
programme.desc: When Vanessa returns home for Christmas, her name comes up for a huge promotion back at work! She is torn between taking the job or staying home to take over the family clinic, while her visit has rekindled an old romance as well.

programme.title: 14 Love Letters
programme.desc: After historic love letters start anonymously appearing in Kallie Sharp's mailbox, the hobby farmer searches for her secret admirer and opens herself up to love.

programme.title: Hot Chocolate Holiday
programme.desc: Colette runs a coffee shop that is home to her secret and famous hot chocolate recipe. She finds herself in competition with Marcus, the kind, new dessert shop owner who draws her customers away with his own specialty hot chocolate. Colette thinks he stole her recipe but she gives him a chance when his store suffers damage from a fire and has to close. Colette works together with him to repair his shop but it might not be enough to get him back on his feet in time for Christmas. It will, however, help Colette see Marcus in a different light, especially as she learns the source of his hot chocolate recipe. Love, hot chocolate and an unexpected connection will bring Marcus and Colette together for the holidays.

programme.title: Mistletoe Mixup
programme.desc: A workaholic with no time for romance, or the holidays ends up meeting two potential suitors on the same day, but unbeknownst to her, they turn out to be brothers. A sibling squabble commences in this holiday romance.

programme.title: Love Switch
programme.desc: On their 13th wedding anniversary, James and Michelle wake up to discover they have somehow switched bodies. Unable to switch back, they are forced to understand what the other goes through daily.

programme.title: Passport to Love
programme.desc: Nicole, a successful travel blogger, meets Kade, a marketing rep for a travel publishing company, and they form the beginnings of a relationship while exploring an island destination. They juggle their work traveling around the world while seeing each other again. Both know there's something special between them, but it will be put to the test when Kade's competitive boss challenges Kade to thwart Nicole's business.

programme.title: Dear Christmas
programme.desc: Natalie Morgan's Holiday Love podcast explores real holiday romances.

programme.title: Hometown Christmas
programme.desc: Noelle Collins revives Louisiana town's live nativity for Christmas.

programme.title: Jingle Belle
programme.desc: Annually, Isabelle and Mike wowed their town's Christmas Eve Pageant with a duet.

programme.title: The Ugly Christmas Sweater
programme.desc: Megan hunts for top Christmas hashtag to wow boss and crush at work.

programme.title: Becoming Santa
programme.desc: Holly decides to introduce her boyfriend Connor to her family up north.

programme.title: The Bad Son
programme.desc: An elusive serial killer is killing innocent women in Seattle. The police and FBI are on the killer's trail but were never prepared to face a bizarre twist in the case.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: Sparks fly between an interior designer and a handsome pilot who finds homes for rescue dogs.

programme.title: Falling in Love at Christmas
programme.desc: Business rivals who playfully despise each other work together on a holiday gift-giving app and feelings grow.

programme.title: The Love Club: Lauren
programme.desc: Lauren faces divorce papers but has a feeling that it's not quite over, so she asks the Love Club for help.

programme.title: Rock The Kasbah
programme.desc: ROCK THE KASBAH is the story of 'Richie Vance,' a has-been rock manager who takes his last remaining client on a USO tour of Afghanistan. When Richie finds himself in Kabul, abandoned, penniless and without his passport, he discovers a young girl with an extraordinary voice and manages her through Afghanistan's version of 'American Idol', the wildly popular 'Afghan Star'.

programme.title: Think Like A Man
programme.desc: Four friends conspire to turn the tables on their women when they discover the ladies have been using Steve Harvey's relationship advice against them.

programme.title: The Star
programme.desc: A small but brave donkey and his animal friends become the unsung heroes of the first Christmas.

programme.title: One Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A newly-divorced mom has some unexpected adventures the night before Christmas.

programme.title: Bonanza Compilation Episodes 19, 20, 21
programme.desc: The Wild West adventures of Ben Cartwright and his sons as they run and defend their Nevada ranch while helping the surrounding community.

programme.title: The Bounty Killer
programme.desc: A tenderfoot becomes a bounty hunter in the hopes of making a better future for himself and his new love.

programme.title: Pawnee
programme.desc: Pale Arrow is a white man raised since a boy by the Pawnee Chief. With wagon trains now encroaching on Pawnee land, the Chief sends Pale Arrow to be with the white people.

programme.title: Alive or Preferably Dead
programme.desc: Two brothers, Monty and Ted, will inherit $300,000 if they manage to live together for six months.

programme.title: Django the Last Killer
programme.desc: Ramon's parents are killed by men of landowner John Barrett. While trying to get revenge, Ramon is wounded but has saved the life of Rezza, an old disillusioned killer.

programme.title: Swallows and Amazons
programme.desc: Set in 1929 and based upon Arthur Ransome's immortal children's novel, "Swallows and Amazons" is the story of a group of children who man two sailing dinghies, 'Swallow' and 'Amazon' and plan mock 'sea-battles' in the Lake District.

programme.title: Tales of Beatrix Potter
programme.desc: Jeremy Fisher, Mrs. Tiggywinke, Jemima Puddleduck, Squirrel Nutkin, Pigling Bland - indeed all the delightful and famous Beatrix Potter characters - come to life in this colorful and imaginative musical interpretation of her tales, choreographed by Sir Frederick Ashton, composed and scored by John Lanchbery and danced by members of the Royal Ballet. Five of the famed Victorian author's most well-known stories - with guest appearances of characters from other themes - have been linked to present an enchanting story-line that will thrill adults and children alike.

programme.title: CAR OF DREAMS
programme.desc: Robert is the son of the owner of a musical-instrument factory. He is in love with Vera, one of the factory workers, who is unaware of his position. When she jokes one day that she would love a Rolls-Royce, Robert makes sure that she gets one.

programme.title: Three Hats for Lisa
programme.desc: A gorgeous continental film star comes to London for the premiere of her latest film and is whisked away by her number one fan, a Cockney docker and his three friends.

programme.title: The Divorce of Lady X
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier plays Logan, a divorce lawyer, stranded in overcrowded hotel.

programme.title: Jump! Jump! Jump!
programme.desc: Your youth's dreams and setbacks, along with growth and resilience, unfold with K-POP!

programme.title: Toxic Parents
programme.desc: Yoo-ri, a seemingly model student from a well-to do family suddenly commits suicide at a lakeside campsite with several people she met via a suicide group. Detectives suspect suicide, but her mother Hye-young firmly believes that her classmate Ye-na and homeroom teacher Gi-beom were the killers. Ye-na is an idol trainee and Gi-beom is a teacher who looked after Yoo-ri. As the investigation dives into the lives of these people, it spirals out of control due to conflicting statements between the three, but detectives find out that actions of Hye-young started causing cracks in Yoo-ri's heart. Deeply believing that she was doing everything possible for her child out of love, can Hye-young uncover the real truth behind her daughter's death?

programme.title: Evil Empire: Friday the 13th Chapter 2
programme.desc: A series of serial killings known as the "Suicide Syndrome" continue to occur simultaneously, and the whereabouts of both Phillip and Cheong-ha, who were investigating the case, remain mysterious. Meanwhile, the young police officer Jae-hyeok, who provided crucial clues to Cheong-ha in her time of crisis, finds himself relentlessly pursued by killers dispatched from Japan and the United States. Despite relying on information from an anonymous woman who calls him unilaterally, Jae-hyeok unwittingly gets drawn closer to the center of the case as the situation progresses. At the same time, in a hospital in Pyongyang, North Korea, a female doctor discovers a phenomenon where the cells of the deceased are being revived. However, she is forced to flee to South Korea due to the authorities' pursuit. What is the key to the case that Jae-hyeok holds? Why are ruthless killers from the United States pursuing him? Why is the foreign police from Japan investigating the "Suicide Syndrome" in Korea? And why is North Korea trying to conceal the truth about a secret project from the Japanese military? Genre

programme.title: Idol Recipe
programme.desc: In this mind-boggling situation, Jae-sung begins retracing the steps of the vanished memories and money from the previous night... "15-year veteran idol manager" Bae Jae-sung, whose passion has completely cooled down. The dream recipe for creating a K-POP idol is now revealed! He squanders a dream-like opportunity and 1 billion won in cash in just one night. Instead, he must protect the idol group "Bella," which is like a doppelganger! Here's the problem: he has absolutely no recollection of last night's actions!

programme.title: Love Lies
programme.desc: Two friends fall apart as they compete their love for music romance and the chance to become Joseon's voice.

programme.title: Nailed
programme.desc: Jae-gu and Sun-yeong a couple that runs an auto-shop off set off an chain of events headed for catastrophe.

programme.title: Hide-And-Never Seek
programme.desc: VJ Glow is the MC of the horror-based online channel. One day he stumbles upon a frightening video of mystery.

programme.title: Circle Of Atonement
programme.desc: A grieving teacher meets a detective's daughter unveiling a long-hidden secret through their connection.

programme.title: The Day Time Ended
programme.desc: A futuristic solar home in the far desert was supposed to be their refuge from urban crime. To their horror, the family discovers they're caught in a mind-boggling time warp caused by mysterious aliens with a sinister secret.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky (Charlie Sheen) believes he's picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to Mexico and a mysterious power plant, where is arrested for the murder of a scientist.

programme.title: Strawberry Mansion
programme.desc: In the near future an unassuming dream tax auditor gets swept up in a cosmic journey through the life and dreams of an ageing eccentric.

programme.title: Earth to Echo
programme.desc: Tuck, Munch and Alex are a trio of inseparable friends who long for adventure. One day the boys find a cryptic signal on their phones and convinced that it is part of something bigger they set out on a quest to find the source.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Program information is not yet available

programme.title: Christmas at Plumhill Manor
programme.desc: Margot Stone, a rising architect in New York, discovers a magical Christmas secret in an English countryside manor she unexpectedly inherits. Starring Maria Menounos and Kyle Pryor (2024)

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Program information is not yet available

programme.title: Christmas Unwrapped
programme.desc: A reporter investigates a man who insists that all of the Christmas gifts his charity gives are magically supplied by Santa Claus. Starring Amber Stevens West (2020)

programme.title: A Blue Ridge Mountain Christmas
programme.desc: Willow returns to her hometown to help with her sister's Christmas wedding. But will her life change forever when she meets the new owner of her family's former inn? Rachael Leigh Cook stars. (2019)

programme.title: Coming Home for Christmas
programme.desc: (2017) Yuletide extravaganza with Danica McKellar. As she preps a country estate for sale, a woman tries to uncover the dysfunctional owners' festive spirit with the perfect final Christmas Ev

programme.title: The Baker
programme.desc: A hitman's new rural life is threatened when his old bosses come to town. An action-packed comedy starring Damian Lewis.

programme.title: Exit Speed
programme.desc: Strangers use improvised weapons, adrenaline and sheer guts to mount a defense against murderous bikers and their survival depends on doing the unthinkable - fighting for their lives!

programme.title: Hours
programme.desc: When his beloved wife dies in childbirth, Nolan (Paul Walker) is left to care for their newborn on his own while Hurricane Katrina simultaneously devastates the coast of Louisiana.

programme.title: An Imperfect Murder
programme.desc: An Imperfect Murder is a cat and mouse thriller which will leave you guessing until the very end – staring Sienna Miller and Alec Baldwin.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: 7 Seconds
programme.desc: When an experienced thief accidentally makes off with a Van Gogh, his partner is kidnapped by gangsters in pursuit of the painting, forcing the criminal to hatch a rescue plan.

programme.title: Roman J. Israel, Esq.
programme.desc: Denzel Washington stars as Roman Israel, a driven, idealistic defense attorney who, through a tumultuous series of events, finds himself in a crisis that leads to extreme action.

programme.title: Boa Vs. Python
programme.desc: Two of nature's biggest and most terrifying scaled predators square off in an action packed battle of fangs. When a gigantic python gets loose on a private reserve, the FBI must release an equally large boa to track and capture it as a group of wealthy big game hunters try to bag the python as a trophy themselves.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into The Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Spider-Man crosses dimensions and teams up with the Spider-Men of those dimensions.

programme.title: Anaconda 3: Offspring
programme.desc: A ruthless mercenary, Hammett (David Hasselhoff) and his team are on the hunt for a pair of giant snakes that have escaped and are on a mega-sized feeding frenzy.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: The youngest son (Hardy) of an alcoholic former boxer (Nolte) returns home, where he's trained by his father for competition in a mixed martial arts tournament -- a path that puts the fighter on a collision corner with his older brother (Edgerton).

programme.title: Diana
programme.desc: Celebrated and adored by millions, she was the Queen of people's hearts, yet the bittersweet story of the last man to truly capture hers has never before. In a story that until now has remained untold, Diana introduces a time in the Princess's life that was important in shaping her final years...

programme.title: Peacock
programme.desc: John Skillpa, a quiet bank clerk living in tiny Peacock, Nebraska, prefers to live an invisible life. This might have to do with John's secret: he has another personality no one knows about, a woman who each morning cooks him breakfast before he starts his day. Then, in a moment, everything changes.

programme.title: Supercell
programme.desc: Aspiring storm-chaser William is determined to continue his father's legacy by chasing the most dangerous supercell tornado ever seen.

programme.title: The Legend Of Hercules
programme.desc: In the epic origin story the legend of Hercules, a half-god, half-man blessed with extraordinary streng. Betrayed by his stepfather, the king, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers.

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: It's a race for survival in the criminal underworld of New York in the action-packed thriller TRACERS.

programme.title: Iron Fury
programme.desc: In 1944, a young lieutenant leads a courageous group of Russian soldiers in a German POW camp, plotting a daring escape from captivity in a half-dest
